checkUpkeep(bytes).details: Ths is the function that chainlink node will call if the lottery is ready to have a winner picked. The following should be true in ordrer for upkeepNeeded to be true: 1. The time interval has passed between raffle runs 2. The lottery is open 3. The contract has ETH 4. Implicitly, your subscription has LINK

returns.upkeepNeeded: true if it's time to restart the lottery

params: - an unsigned integer is passed as index to retrieve address positionally

pickWinner(bytes).details: This function is auto called by chainlink automations every second

params: (performData) unused; required by Chainlink Atomation interface. Pass an empty string.

acceptOwnership().notice: Allows an ownership transfer to be completed by the recipient.

getParticipant(uint256).notice: - This function is used to get a specific user address

getState().notice: - This function is used to check the state of the contract

getTotalParticipants().notice: - This function gets the total number of participants

setCoordinator(address).notice: Sets the VRF Coordinator addressThis method should only be callable by the coordinator or contract owner

transferOwnership(address).notice: Allows an owner to begin transferring ownership to a new address.
